Authorization Indicator3 CHAR 2
BN Brand Name CHAR 30
GNN Generic Name CHAR 30
STR Drug Strength Description CHAR 10
GCDF Dosage Form Code CHAR 2
GCDF_DESC Dosage Form Code Description CHAR 40
1 This file was first available starting with the 2010 data release.
2 Prior to the 2013 data release, CCW was required to encrypt this sensitive data field. We are no longer required
to encrypt this variable.
3 For 2006-2009 the utilization management variables were available on the PDE File for filled
